sibling_studies.name: fusion
sibling_studies.relationship: parallel — separate task (POI-category classification), separate baselines (HAVANA/PGC/POI-RGNN), separate state machine. Shared codebase + infrastructure.

p0_integrity_check2hgi_al.description: Run integrity checks on Check2HGI Alabama artefacts (embeddings, next.parquet, next_region.parquet, checkin_graph.pt).
p0_integrity_check2hgi_al.notes: Run before any training. See coordinator/integrity_checks.md.

p0_integrity_check2hgi_fl.description: Run integrity checks on Check2HGI Florida artefacts.
p0_integrity_check2hgi_fl.notes: Florida is ~4x Alabama's size; verify no NaN / Inf / shape mismatches.

p0_fclass_shortcut_audit_al.description: Audit whether Check2HGI inherits the HGI fclass -> category 1:1 shortcut (fusion C29 finding). Inspect preprocessing pipeline for POI2Vec dependency; if present, run an fclass-shuffle arm C ablation on next_poi (not next_category — which is not our task).
p0_fclass_shortcut_audit_al.notes: Depends on whether Check2HGI preprocessing (research/embeddings/check2hgi/preprocess.py) uses POI2Vec. If not, the audit becomes a declared 'not applicable' and CH14 resolves to confirmed-by-construction.

p0_code_deltas_next_poi_loader.description: Code delta: add src/data/inputs/next_poi.py + IoPaths.get_next_poi + CHECK2HGI_NEXT_POI_REGION preset + next_poi pipeline + FoldCreator route. Unit tests pass.
p0_code_deltas_next_poi_loader.notes: ~2-3h of mechanical code work. Infrastructure delta (not a scientific test), but the coordinator should track it as the P1 prerequisite.
